scripts.copy-assets: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const from=path.join(process.cwd(),'..');const to=path.join(process.cwd(),'public');['assets','demos'].forEach(d=>{const src=path.join(from,d);const dest=path.join(to,d);if(fs.existsSync(src)){try{fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});console.log('Copied '+d);}catch(e){console.warn('Copy '+d+':',e.message);}}else{console.warn('Skip '+d+' (not found)');}});"
